'''ramaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loaminess|loaminess]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loaminess|loaminess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ramaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræmæyæth|ræmæyæth]] || [[word:ræmæyæj|ræmæyæj]] || [[word:ræmæyæsh|ræmæyæsh]] || [[word:ræmæyæ|ræmæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ramamayath|ramamayath]] || [[word:ramamayaj|ramamayaj]] || [[word:ramamayash|ramamayash]] || [[word:ramamaya|ramamaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ramayath|ramayath]] || [[word:ramayaj|ramayaj]] || [[word:ramayash|ramayash]] || [[word:ramaya|ramaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ramafyath|ramafyath]] || [[word:ramafyaj|ramafyaj]] || [[word:ramafyash|ramafyash]] || [[word:ramafyaf|ramafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ramayatha|ramayatha]] || [[word:ramayaja|ramayaja]] || [[word:ramayasha|ramayasha]] || [[word:ramayaka|ramayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ramayath|ramayath]] || [[word:ramayaj|ramayaj]] || [[word:ramayash|ramayash]] || [[word:ramaya|ramaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ramayathal|ramayathal]] || [[word:ramayajal|ramayajal]] || [[word:ramayashal|ramayashal]] || [[word:ramayakal|ramayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ramayathatha|ramayathatha]] || [[word:ramayajaja|ramayajaja]] || [[word:ramayashasha|ramayashasha]] || [[word:ramayaka|ramayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ramayathan|ramayathan]] || [[word:ramayajan|ramayajan]] || [[word:ramayashan|ramayashan]] || [[word:ramayakan|ramayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ramayathaoro|ramayathaoro]] || [[word:ramayajaoro|ramayajaoro]] || [[word:ramayashaoro|ramayashaoro]] || [[word:ramayakaoro|ramayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
